case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC., vs. LINEBARGER, LOY ERNEST III et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC., OF SACRAMENTO A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LINEBARGER, LOY ERNEST III DOE ONE THRU TEN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-06-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-09-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-16-1994
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS LINEBARGER III, LOY ELROY ERNEST IND & DBA TO BE LINEBARGER, LOY ERNEST III
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT BY CONDITIONAL DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC., OF SACRAMENTO A CORPORATION
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-06-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-06-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 STATUS OF PAYMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
